description: This file defines a client-side API interface for interacting with a backend service related to notes. It includes functions for checking backend health, listing, creating, updating, and deleting notes, although these are currently not implemented and throw errors. It also contains a utility to determine the backend URL from environment variables.

methods.name: function getBaseUrl(): string { getBaseUrl
methods.description: Returns the backend base URL, trimmed of trailing slashes, based on the environment variable.

methods.name: async function http<T>(path: string, init?: RequestInit): Promise<T> { http
methods.description: Performs an HTTP request to the backend, handling JSON responses and error cases.

methods.name: export async function backendHealthCheck(): Promise<boolean> { backendHealthCheck
methods.description: Checks if the backend service is reachable and healthy by pinging the root endpoint.

methods.name: function notImplemented(): never { notImplemented
methods.description: Helper that throws an error indicating the backend API function is not yet implemented.

methods.name: export async function backendListNotes(query: NotesQuery): Promise<Note[]> { backendListNotes
methods.description: Planned function to list notes from backend; currently not implemented.

methods.name: export async function backendCreateNote(input: NoteCreateInput): Promise<Note> { backendCreateNote
methods.description: Planned function to create a note via backend; currently not implemented.

methods.name: export async function backendUpdateNote(noteId: NoteId, patch: NoteUpdateInput): Promise<Note> { backendUpdateNote
methods.description: Planned function to update a note via backend; currently not implemented.

methods.name: export async function backendDeleteNote(noteId: NoteId): Promise<void> { backendDeleteNote
methods.description: Planned function to delete a note via backend; currently not implemented.

ctags.pattern: /^export async function backendUpdateNote(noteId: NoteId, patch: NoteUpdateInput): Promise<Note> {$/

ctags.name: http
ctags.pattern: /^async function http<T>(path: string, init?: RequestInit): Promise<T> {$/
